scripts.typecheck: powershell -Command "$errs = @(tsc --noEmit --pretty false) -notmatch 'node_modules' -notmatch '^\s+'; if ($errs) { $errs; exit 1 } else { exit 0 }"
scripts.zip: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path sf2e-auto-action-tracker; Copy-Item -Path dist\* -Destination sf2e-auto-action-tracker -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path module.json, README.md -Destination sf2e-auto-action-tracker -Force; Compress-Archive -Path sf2e-auto-action-tracker -DestinationPath sf2e-auto-action-tracker.zip -Force; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force sf2e-auto-action-tracker"
